category_sources: source_facts.description says Tesseract is an OCR engine; official tessdoc site is the Tesseract user manual.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is tesseract; official documentation and project branding identify Tesseract OCR.
docs_sources: Official Tesseract documentation is hosted at tesseract-ocr.github.io/tessdoc and the tessdoc repository is the Tesseract documentation project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/tesseract-ocr/tesseract, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies OCR; official documentation is the Tesseract user manual for OCR usage and tooling.
